title: Stage Equipment Furnitures
description: Professionals Music Speakers, Custom Songs, Roleplay
body: ![](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/3m6yy7tjbaz07tct5drka/StageEquipmentBanner.png?rlkey=eladtvviz2hej08bofgogo652&st=jdjxy07k&dl=1) ![](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/n2pggdc2lt1fqlwcofhsa/2023-07-13_10.37.28.png?rlkey=40pyzfauweis3y44rymto1bos&dl=0) # \- Stage Equipment Bring your events to life inside Minecraft with **Stage Equipment**, a mod designed to expand your building possibilities with realistic stage structures and audio-themed decorations. Whether you're creating a massive music festival, a small live concert, or a detailed roleplay event, this mod provides a variety of blocks and props that allow you to build immersive and believable stage setups. *** ## Make Sure to use FFmpeg converted Audio Files (MP3, OGG, WAV), otherwise the audio track may crash or may not start. --- ## Features: ### \- Modular Stage Construction Build fully customizable stages using scaffolding systems and structural elements. Combine different pieces to create anything from simple platforms to complex professional setups. ### \- Speakers & Audio Systems Add realism to your builds with detailed speaker blocks and audio equipment. Perfect for simulating concert environments, DJ booths, or backstage technical areas. ### \- Stage Equipment Decorate your builds with technical gear that enhances the overall look of your setup. These elements are designed to fit naturally into performance environments. ### \- Immersive Decorations Every block is made to help you create believable scenes, whether it's a live performance, festival stage, or event area. *** ## \- Perfect For: * Roleplay servers * Creative builders * Concert and festival recreations *** ## \- Showcase *** **Older Versions Are currently archived.** *** ## \- Join the Community [![](https://i.imgur.com/JgDt1Fl.png)](https://discord.gg/GAhNZRBx4h) *** ## \- Mod Author ## Mod by tizio_bello
